title.en: As for the other other geniuses, he won't save ...

content.en:
Click!

These other shore-level geniuses shattered their petrified bodies for the first time, and the remnants immediately fled.

And Ye Tian could only protect the Lord of Xuan Miao and make sure that she was okay.

As for the other other geniuses, he won't save them.

Rumble!!!

The Stone Python was killed.

Ye Tian asked the Lord of Mystery to go first, and stopped the Stone Python himself.

Swish!

The tail of the Stone Python swept away, spanning layers of time and space.

A genius at the other side couldn't escape in time, and was directly swept away.

Originally, this other shore-level genius had been petrified once before, and at this moment he was just a remnant.

As a result, he simply couldn't dodge the blow.

"Endless Lord save me!"

This other side genius called for help.

But it was too late.

Bang!

This other shore-level genius was swept into countless pieces by the tail of the ruin stone python at once, and completely fell to his death.

Soon.

The Stone Python was eyeing Ye Tian, because Ye Tian was the most powerful among these other level geniuses.

It wanted to petrify Ye Tian's body.

However, Ye Tian's speed was too fast, and the gray light shot out by the Stone Python could not hit Ye Tian.

However, in the middle of the fight, any part of the body of the Stone Python can exert this special petrification ability.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body was knocked into the air, and his arms began to petrify.

However, his golden body on the other side was too powerful, and the Stone Python only petrified his skin a little, and it could not continue to petrify.

"Very well, this stone python can't completely petrify me, then I have hope of defeating it. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian kept making moves, fighting with this ruin stone python.

However, he could only fight it, but he could not kill it.

"The body of this Stone Python is too tough for even the Golden Mangs on my other side to break through its defenses. "

Therefore, he was helpless against it.

After seeing that the other other geniuses had left, he could only retreat with him.

The stone python didn't chase it too far, and returned to its lair.

......

"This time, two other shore-level geniuses have fallen!"

A genius of the other side level saw everyone gathered together, and said with regret and horror.

The Lord of Mystery was also in a bad mood, she knew very well that after this incident, these other shore-level geniuses would have to retreat again and want to leave here.

Wow!

Ye Tian is back.

"Endless Lord, did you kill that python?"

The Lord of Mystery asked.

Ye Tian shook his head, "No, that giant python's strength is very strong, I can only compete with it, I can't kill it!"

Seeing that Ye Tiandu couldn't help the ruin stone python, the Lord of Mystery didn't know what to do!

Then.

Ye Tian suggested: "Lord of Mystery, this treasure land is very dangerous, this is only a part of the treasure land, if it continues, I may survive, but in case there are many creatures like the Ruined Stone Python, I can't guarantee your safety, Lord of Mystery." "

The Lord of Xuan Miao knew what Ye Tian meant, and he suggested retreating.

The other other shore-level geniuses didn't want to continue for a long time, and seeing that Ye Tian had the idea of retreating, they also followed.

"Lord of Mystery, let's retreat!"

"There are more powerful Peer-level geniuses in the middle of the country, and you can invite them in. "

Seeing that all the other side level geniuses didn't want to stay here, the Lord of Mystery had no choice but to retreat.

"Okay, then retreat first!"

The Lord of Mystery nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took the Lord of Mystery and they left here, and soon came out of this treasure land.

As soon as it came out.

The Lord of the Ice Cave immediately appeared, and when he saw that many other shore-level geniuses did not come out, he had a bad idea in his heart.

But seeing the Lord of Mystics come out, he was relieved.

"What's going on, what about the other other Shore-level geniuses?"

The Lord of the Ice Cave asked anyway.

At this time, the Lord of Xuan Miao said, "The other other shore-level geniuses have fallen!"

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Mystic and the Lord of the Ice Cave went to discuss it, and also explained the situation inside.

The Lord of the Ice Cave had no choice but to temporarily announce the suspension of exploring this treasure land.

As for the other side level geniuses who wanted to leave, the Xiao family also gave some resources according to the agreement and let them leave, but they must keep it secret and not allow the disclosure of the situation of this treasure land.

Ye Tian didn't leave, he still wanted to continue to enter here!

However, before he had enough strength, he really couldn't help the Stone Python.

Maybe there are even more dangerous creatures in this treasure land, so it is safest to come out first and bring these resources out.

In case the replica body falls inside, it is nothing to die once, but the treasures on the body are gone, and the loss is too great.

The other side of the origin of the bamboo marrow!

Nothingness bamboo honey!

Nothingness Golden Bamboo Honey!

The other side of the origin of the golden bamboo!

And the ruin stone!

That's all good stuff!

Subsequently.

He extracted the Ruin Yang Liquid from the Ruin Yang Stone, and then refined the Ruin Yang Liquid to improve his Origin Realm Will, which would also improve his strength a little.

Next.

Those Void Bamboo Honey and Void Golden Bamboo Honey in Ye Tianjing are all special resources, which can temporarily improve their comprehension, and the effect is similar to that of the Enlightenment Fruit on the other side.

Thereupon.

His other replica body was ready to return to Wind Tooth Island with these Void Bamboo Honey, and then continue to comprehend the Golden Script and the Haven on the other side.

Ye Tian knew very well that if he wanted to kill a creature like the Stone Python, it was useless to just improve the origin rules of the other side, and he couldn't kill the other party at all.

There was only one way for him to do it, and that was to create the Supreme Technique of the Other Side.

Only by comprehending the 109,600 Golden Scripts and 109,600 Upper Scripts are qualified to create the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore.

So.

Ye Tian was ready to take advantage of this time to continue to comprehend the golden text on the other side and the black text on the other side, if he could create the supreme technique on the other side, then he would not be afraid of those stone pythons.

"The Xiao family has invited a lot of other side level geniuses this time, and now that so many other side level geniuses have fallen, even if they will compensate for some losses, they still have to fight off, plus if they want to invite more top other side level geniuses, it will take time. So, there will be no second operation at all in the short term. "

Thereupon.

After Ye Tian's copy body came back with the Void Bamboo Honey and the Void Golden Bamboo Honey, he was at ease to comprehend the Golden Text on the other side and the Haven on the other side.

Although the Void Bamboo Honey can improve the understanding, the effect is average, but the effect of the Void Golden Bamboo Honey is really good.

In addition, his original comprehension is very high, so this treasure has helped him too much.
